summary: RTL/LTR direction context provider for subtree layout and mirroring.
usageDo: Set `dir` at the route shell for locale switches.
Mirror spacing utilities when flipping to RTL.
Test focus order in both directions.
Document direction in handoff for engineers.
usageDont: Do not toggle `dir` without reflowing breakpoints.
Do not nest conflicting direction providers.
Do not rely on CSS `float` for critical layout.
Do not forget mirrored icons for back navigation.
